content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "There is partial, real movement but the deeper feeling has not been named or stayed with. The client starts in a fully externalized 'system is rigged / it's being done to me' stance (turns 1, 3) and by turn 15 has dropped briefly into a quiet, almost involuntary nod acknowledging 'Yeah. It is' to the weight of carrying this alone. That's a genuine somatic softening ('stills a little', 'longer pause than usual', 'small nod, almost involuntary') — the surface defense cracked. However, the client immediately re-armors in the same turn ('that's not unique to me... which is why I need to know what the actual options are'), and the breakthrough condition — naming the feared feeling underneath (helplessness, shame, or rage at being treated as disposable) — has not been met. The coach also has not yet named the specific choice being avoided or the specific feared consequence. The deeper layer was approached and briefly touched (turn 15) but not entered. This is the textbook description of a 2: 'a deeper layer was approached but not entered.'",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 7, 9, 13, 15],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening stance: fully externalized victim/trap framing — 'system is rigged,' 'nothing to be done.'"},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reinforces 'it's being done to me' — the aggressive-victim stance is fully active."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Small laugh, looks away — a flicker of self-awareness; says 'mostly' frustration, leaving a small opening."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Jaw tightens, names 'demoralization' — slight expansion of affective vocabulary beyond frustration, though quickly resealed with 'situation is what it is.'"},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Defensive laugh, eye contact breaks — actively repels the invitation to feel. No movement; reasserts 'it's not about feelings.'"},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Doubles down defensively — 'what would you have me do, pretend the ceiling isn't there?' Resistance escalates."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stills, longer pause, acknowledges 'nowhere to put it' — real softening, though immediately followed by 'not looking for sympathy.'"},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Quiet, almost involuntary nod, 'Yeah. It is' — the clearest somatic shift in the conversation. But re-armors within the same turn; the feeling is touched, not entered or named."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "aggressive-victim-stance", "fear-triangle", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Conversation cut at turn 15 — possible the next moves would have landed the breakthrough. As-is, the helplessness was glimpsed in the body (turn 15 nod) but not named by the client. No 'I just realized' moment, no naming of the feared feeling under the feared consequence."
}
